channel.title: Shelly on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Shelly on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Garage door control with Shelly and BLE
item.description: Garage doors usually come with proprietary remotes, which may have drawbacks. This page explains how to replace remotes for the Entrematic Magic 600-2, with the Shelly 1 Gen3 relay and the Shelly BLU Button Tough 1.
